entity.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched as Bitholic in May 2018, renamed Bithumb Singapore in August 2019 under a Bithumb trademark license, and reported closed in March 2022 after the license ended.
entity.notes: Bitholic and Bithumb Singapore are one identity, separate from Bithumb Korea and BitGlobal. March 2022 is stored at month precision from independent exchange-graveyard sources; no first-party final shutdown notice was recovered, so death_reason remains unknown.

events.title: Bitholic launched in Singapore
events.description: Singapore fintech company RDMCHAIN launched the global crypto-to-crypto exchange Bitholic in May 2018.
events.notes: Month-level marker from the pre-launch company announcement.

events.title: Bitholic became Bithumb Singapore
events.description: The Singapore exchange changed its name from Bitholic to Bithumb Singapore under a partnership and trademark arrangement with Bithumb.
events.notes: Exact marker follows contemporaneous reporting and exchange-profile history.

events.title: Bithumb Singapore trademark license ended
events.description: Bithumb Korea terminated the non-exclusive trademark agreement that allowed the Singapore exchange to use the Bithumb name and branding.
events.notes: The license termination confirms that Bithumb Singapore was independently operated; it is not itself the final shutdown marker.

events.title: Bithumb Singapore ceased operations
events.description: Exchange-tracking services record Bithumb Singapore as having terminated operations during March 2022, after which no active trading pairs or volume remained.
events.notes: Month-level terminal marker. No first-party final shutdown notice was recovered, so the cause remains unknown.

evidence.title: Global Crypto-Crypto Exchange Bitholic Opening Soon
evidence.notes: Company announcement states that the Singapore-based Bitholic exchange would start in May 2018.

evidence.title: Bitholic Now Bithumb Singapore
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting documents the Bitholic-to-Bithumb Singapore name change.

evidence.title: Termination of Bithumb trademark agreements
evidence.notes: First-party notice identifies Bithumb Singapore as a separate trademark licensee and sets termination for July 30, 2021.

evidence.title: Bithumb Singapore Exchange Graveyard entry
evidence.notes: Exchange Graveyard records Bithumb Singapore as closed in March 2022 for business reasons.

evidence.title: Bithumb Singapore inactive market profile
evidence.notes: Current profile states that the exchange terminated services in March 2022 and has no active markets.
